'''Glurrg''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] who served under [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Huba]] in the [[Indobok Pirates]].

==Biography==
Formerly a cook along with the rest of the gang, he was forced to work in a crystal mine after [[Olag Greck]] framed the chefs for an attempted poisoning of [[Boonda/Legends|Boonda]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]. After escaping the mine, he helped steal the ''[[Tharen Wayfarer]]'' from the [[Pitareeze family]].

{{Char-stub}}
